markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between Gitpod and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers comprehensive content marketing services, including strategy, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month for editorial services, with a 90-day pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Gitpod expressed interest in moving forward, with a potential start date of February 24th](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Agreement to apply the cost of previously purchased courses towards the service fee](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Utilizes AI-powered workflow orchestration for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Conducts extensive company research to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Develops a "Content OS" with scored potential assignments based on relevance and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Aims for 30-50 net new content pieces per month, with a mix of new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Employs pods consisting of strategists, managing editors, and support staff](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [100-step article creation process with multiple review points](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Emphasis on high-quality, in-depth content (1,500-3,000 words per piece)](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Capability to handle technical topics, as demonstrated with clients like Galileo (AI company)](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Offers additional services like podcast processing when needed](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Pricing and Terms

  - [$9,000/month for editorial services, anchored at 50,000 words per month](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [90-day pilot period, defaulting to a year-long contract afterward](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Transparent pricing model, no hidden fees](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Willingness to apply the cost of previously purchased courses towards the service fee](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

### Client Interaction and Management

  - [Regular communication through Slack channels and weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Provision of a dedicated Notion space for project management and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Positive feedback from existing clients (e.g., Ramp, Home Base, Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Gitpod's Concerns and fwd.digital's Responses

  - [Addressed concern about content quality for technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Explained the involvement of experienced strategists and editors in the process](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Offered references from technically-oriented clients](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SLW (proposal) and additional information to Talia](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Marcel to add Talia to fwd.digital's Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Talia to forward pricing and model information to Gitpod's head of finance](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Confirm February 24th as the potential start date for the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Marcel to include language in the proposal about discounting the cost of previously purchased courses](https://fathom.video/share/7i5WdLFAndZ7xSR7XnpkU9MLkibW92Nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
